title: Aurora, 33729, Palm Pals Treasure Starfish 5In, Soft Toy, Orange
features: Introducing Palm Pals Treasure Starfish, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Treasure is on a new adventure every day. They spend their time travelling the ocean floor and discovering new friends and environments. This soft toy is a cute and cuddly orange starfish filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Treasure Starfish is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable starfish-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Treasure Starfish measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable orange colour starfish which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Meet Treasure Starfish, the newest member of Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
